title: capraria uniflora
intro: Capraria uniflora, also known as Single-flowered Thyme, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Capraria uniflora can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
